rationale: The candidate 143ed0cedb8586001f47be18af53f0a4a9e09649 is significantly better than the current version and other candidates. The current version (and the Qwen candidate which is identical to it) contains a major grammatical error in the title ('Arrêtez les fuit' instead of 'fuites') and uses 'fuit' (verb) instead of 'fuite' (noun) throughout the text. The DeepSeek candidate provides a high-quality, natural translation that captures Dan's direct style, uses correct technical terminology (ramasse-miettes, fuite de mémoire), and maintains all MDX structures perfectly.
